source_file: Altumint-TM001(02) Flashing Light Video Monitor Assembly Instructions-240326-194800.pdf

text_blocks.text: Split PoE Injector wire and connect to web relay Relay 1. The C terminal goes to the distribution block. The NO terminal goes to the PoE injector.
text_blocks.label: list_item

text_blocks.text: Complete the power wiring for the modem cable. The white , red, and green wires go to the positive distribution block. The black wire goes to the negative distribution block.
text_blocks.label: list_item

figures.label: page_screenshot

full_text: Split PoE Injector wire and connect to web relay Relay 1. The C terminal goes to the distribution block. The NO terminal goes to the PoE injector. Complete the power wiring for the modem cable. The white , red, and green wires go to the positive distribution block. The black wire goes to the negative distribution block.
